metadata.description: IES light texture - NOT a ShaderGraph feature in Unity

summary: IES light texture - Light Cookies are a Light Component feature, NOT ShaderGraph
implementation_notes: Light Cookies are configured on Unity's Light component, NOT in ShaderGraph. No shader example exists.
approximation: Pre-bake IES to texture or use Unity's native IES import

step_1.name: Unity Light Setup
step_1.description: Apply IES as Light Cookie on Spotlight/Point light

step_2.name: Alternative: Pre-bake
step_2.description: Convert IES to grayscale texture, use as light cookie

blender_to_unity_mapping.notes: NOT a ShaderGraph node - Light component feature

limitations: NO ShaderGraph node for IES/Light Cookies
Light Cookies are a Light Component property
Requires light setup, not material shader
No example exists in Unity ShaderGraph samples

unity_recreation.description: Apply IES file as Light Cookie on Spotlight/Point light
unity_recreation.simple_setup: Import IES to Unity, apply to Light component
